postReview.title: Belgium 3-1 Israel: De Bruyne double hands Red Devils winning start
postReview.description: Belgium responded to their poor Euro 2024 campaign with a win over Israel in the Nations League, with Kevin De Bruyne starring again.

preReview.title: De Bruyne remains committed to Belgium after Euro 2024 disappointment
preReview.description: Some expected Kevin De Bruyne to retire from international football after Euro 2024, but he will lead Belgium again in the Nations League.
